name: Szechwan Chicken with Cashews
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Bamboo shoot, sliced and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut onion into 1-inch pieces.
2. Cut celery into half-inch diagonal pieces.
3. Mix cornstarch, 1 teaspoon soy sauce, and garlic powder together; set aside.
4. Mix instant bouillon and 1/3 cup water together; set aside.
5. Heat oil in wok over medium-high heat until hot.
6. Cook and stir chicken in oil until the chicken turns white; remove chicken from skillet with a slotted spoon.
7. Cook and stir onion/celery mixture in oil until onions are semi-transparent.
8. Stir in chicken, bamboo shoots, chili sauce, and crushed pepper; cook and stir for 1 minute.
9. Stir in bouillon.
10. Heat to boiling; stir in cornstarch/soy sauce mixture; cook and stir until thickened, about 30 seconds.
11. Stir in cashews.
